name: Islam Makhachev
oneLiner: The modern lightweight control case: elite finishing efficiency, high-end prime dominance, and a title run that keeps getting stronger.
compareShortCase: Islam is the modern lightweight resume case: elite skill, growing championship volume, and a deeper title-level resume than Khabib's shorter run.
compareCounter: The counterargument against Islam is that he still does not feel as untouchable as Khabib. The resume may be bigger, but the aura is not quite as clean.
